<findings>

[observation] [info] High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected
[observation] [info] Document and enforce the expected hooks in `create-client.ts` to make onboarding new providers plug-and-play.
[observation] [info] Stand up a shared core client layer with `claude-client` so files like `api-provider.ts`, `cli-provider.ts`, and `exec.ts` inherit common behavior and reduce maintenance overhead.
[observation] [info] Tighten validation in `auth.ts`/`config.ts` to prevent cross-provider credential bleed when multiple backends are configured simultaneously.

</findings>

<insights>

- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected
- Factor duplicated helpers with `claude-client` into a common package so only provider-specific bits diverge.
- Establish clear extension points in `create-client.ts` for plugging in new providers without editing core files.
- Strengthen auth/config validation to ensure multi-provider deployments don’t mix credentials.
- Stand up a shared core client layer with `claude-client` so files like `api-provider.ts`, `cli-provider.ts`, and `exec.ts` inherit common behavior and reduce maintenance overhead.
- Document and enforce the expected hooks in `create-client.ts` to make onboarding new providers plug-and-play.
- Tighten validation in `auth.ts`/`config.ts` to prevent cross-provider credential bleed when multiple backends are configured simultaneously.
- [call graph] 360 internal calls, 0 outgoing, 0 incoming (cohesion: 1, coupling: 0)

</insights>
